error_signature: entire file fails for individual row errors
title: Extract from CSV fails entire workflow for single row errors
symptom: When processing a CSV file, if one row is incorrectly formatted, the entire workflow fails instead of continuing with valid rows.
applies_when: File contains multiple rows with potential formatting issues
not_this_if: All rows in the file are correctly formatted
Using a different method to process the file
root_cause: The Extract From CSV node does not handle individual row errors gracefully, causing the entire workflow to fail when it encounters a formatting issue in any row. This is particularly problematic for large files where only a few rows may be problematic.
fix_steps: Enable the 'Exclude BOM' setting in the Extract From CSV node to avoid issues with zero-width non-breaking spaces.
Consider using a script wrapper around qsv to filter out invalid rows before processing in n8n.
agent_instruction: Enable the 'Exclude BOM' setting and preprocess the file to filter out invalid rows using a script.
